comment: I spend three hours every Monday copying numbers between spreadsheets.
The subscription is too expensive for a solo creator.
This course moves so fast that I don't understand the examples.
The app crashes whenever I upload a large file!
I cannot find clear documentation for the integration.
Customer service ignored my refund request for two weeks.
I'm overwhelmed and worried that I chose the wrong study plan.
Can this weekly reporting workflow be automated?
The interface is confusing and the login button doesn't work.
Scheduling posts manually every day is repetitive and exhausting.
I need one place to automatically organize comments from my exported files.
The hidden fee makes me question whether I can trust this company.
It takes too long to edit captions for every social platform.
The tutorial assumes too much knowledge and the learning curve is steep.
Support was rude and gave me the same useless answer again.
I am anxious because the pricing changes are unclear.
Why do I have to copy and paste every customer order manually?
The analytics are slow and sometimes show broken charts.
I can't find which lesson explains this assignment.
This tool costs too much and I still need another subscription.
There are so many conflicting guides that I have information overload.
I don't trust these fake testimonials and vague security claims.
每周都要手动复制粘贴这些表格，太浪费时间了。
这个软件经常崩溃，界面也很难用。
课程太难了，很多地方看不懂，也没有基础教程。
价格太贵，隐藏费用让我觉得不值得。
客服一直不回复我的退款申请，真的很生气！
每天都要重复发布内容，希望可以一键自动化。
找不到清楚的说明，不知道哪里可以设置集成。
我很焦虑，不确定这个学习计划是否适合我。
账号总是登录出错，已经耽误我几个小时了。
售后态度差，投诉之后还是没人回复。
做短视频字幕太耗时，每个平台还要重新调整。
希望自动整理客户反馈并生成每周报告。
这个课程收费很高，但是内容信息不足。
我担心平台的隐私和安全，不敢上传客户数据。
每个月都要反复核对发票和表格，效率太低。
The export is broken and I urgently need the report today!!
I never know what content topic to choose, and the uncertainty is stressful.
There is no response from support when billing fails.
I want to integrate my approved tools instead of updating each one manually.
The course platform is hard to use on mobile and videos keep freezing.
批量处理订单还是要手动操作，根本不算自动化。
教程说得不清楚，我花了很久还是学不会。
这个月又自动收费了，客服马上帮我退款！
Reading hundreds of exported comments takes hours; I need an automatic summary.
资料太多而且说法互相冲突，我完全不知道该信谁。
每天回复相同的客户问题让我非常烦，希望能自动处理。
